title: Follow-Up Register Full Conformance (v1.0.0 → v1.1.0)
description: Schema conformance audit of follow-up-register.schema.json culminating in v1.1.0: added relatedDecisions (array of d-YYYY-MM-DD-slug strings), meta.byStatus (integer count map), and meta.byPriority (integer count map). Formalizes existing patterns observed across 9 live FUs. Cross-repo authority: FU-FEATURE-DEC-INFRA-GRAPH-ARCHITECTURE (Ectropy-Business consumer).

outputs.description: follow-up-register.schema.json v1.1.0 — adds relatedDecisions, meta.byStatus, meta.byPriority as optional fields (additive, non-breaking).
acceptanceCriteria: relatedDecisions field present: array of strings matching ^d-\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}-[a-z0-9-]+$
meta.byStatus field present: integer counts per status enum
meta.byPriority field present: integer counts per priority enum
All existing valid FU register instances remain valid (additive only)
schema-refs.json pointer updated to reflect v1.1.0

postMerge: Ectropy-Business consumer validated against updated schema

transitions.trigger: Schema conformance audit identified relatedDecisions pattern in 9 live FUs; decision to formalize
Branch feat/follow-up-register-v1.1.0-additive-fields-2026-05-30 created (actual branch name contains version dots; scope.branch normalized for schema conformance)
Post-merge: schema-refs.json updated to v1.1.0; Ectropy-Business consumer validated

notes: Actual branch name was feat/follow-up-register-v1.1.0-additive-fields-2026-05-30 (PR #48). scope.branch normalized to feat/follow-up-register-additive-fields-2026-05-30 because the schema pattern [a-z0-9-]+ does not permit dots — the v1.1.0 version string in the original branch name contains dots. mergedAt was 2026-05-31 (UTC) though the work was completed 2026-05-30 local time.
